en_title: Stranger Things' Millie Bobby Brown Reveals the Unusual Way She Plays Grand Theft Auto Games — and That She Can't Wait for GTA 6
cn_title: 《怪奇物语》女星自曝《侠盗猎车手》守法玩法，期待GTA6
subtitle: 守法好市民
opus_summary: Millie Bobby Brown表示自己热爱《GTA》，并很期待《GTA6》。不过她玩这个系列的方式很特别：遵守交通规则、等红灯、不撞人，还把角色当成上下班通勤者来玩。

paragraphs.en: Stranger Things star Millie Bobby Brown has revealed her love for Grand Theft Auto and says she can't wait for GTA 6 — even though she has an unusual way of playing Rockstar's blockbuster action series.
paragraphs.cn: 《怪奇物语》主演Millie Bobby Brown透露了自己对《侠盗猎车手》的喜爱，并表示她已经等不及要玩《GTA6》了。只不过，她玩Rockstar这套重磅动作系列的方式有点不同寻常。

paragraphs.en: While GTA is known for its car chases and flagrant disregard for pedestrian safety, Brown has said that she enjoys playing while also being a "very, very good" person — following the rules of the road and even stopping at the traffic lights.
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA》以汽车追逐和无视行人安全闻名，但Brown表示，她玩的时候喜欢当一个「非常、非常好」的人：遵守交通规则，甚至会在红灯前停下。

paragraphs.en: Speaking on the Happy, Sad, Confused podcast, the Enola Homes actress was asked about her favorite video game of all time — to which she immediately said GTA, and revealed that she held a secret "passion" for it.
paragraphs.cn: 在Happy, Sad, Confused播客中，这位《福尔摩斯小姐》演员被问到自己最喜欢的电子游戏是什么。她立刻回答《GTA》，并透露自己对它有一种秘密的「热情」。

paragraphs.en: "I'm so excited for GTA," she said, admitting this was the first time she'd discussed the matter publicly. "It's a passion. I follow the rules in GTA. I don't break the rules. I stop at the red lights, I never run anyone over.
paragraphs.cn: 她说：「我太期待《GTA》了。」她承认这是自己第一次公开谈起这件事。「这是一种热情。我在《GTA》里会遵守规则。我不会破坏规则。我会在红灯前停下，我从来不会撞倒任何人。」

paragraphs.en: "My husband is like, 'Why are you playing this like it's [The] Sims?'" she continued. "I'm like, 'I'm gonna go to the strip club... but I'm not going to get drunk.' I'm very, very good."
paragraphs.cn: 她继续说：「我丈夫就会说，‘你为什么把它玩得像《模拟人生》一样？’我就说，‘我要去脱衣舞俱乐部……但我不会喝醉。’我非常、非常乖。」

paragraphs.en: Brown added that she liked to play GTA as if her character was just on their commute to their job, even if missions sometimes required her job to be killing other characters. "I'm not a hitman, I'm a vigilante," she concluded, sharing her internal rationale for situations such as these.
paragraphs.cn: Brown补充说，她喜欢把《GTA》玩成自己的角色只是在通勤上班，即使任务有时要求她的「工作」是杀死其他角色。她最后说：「我不是杀手，我是义警。」这是她为这类情况给自己的内心理据。

paragraphs.en: The past few weeks have seen a flood of information on GTA 6 materialize, as Rockstar finally begins the game's lengthy marketing campaign ahead of its long-awaited launch this November. While new screenshots of the game look stunning , fans have criticized , something that perhaps makes more sense following Sony's shock announcement today that it will eventually kill off PS5 game discs . There's been more drama behind the scenes, too, as more employees attempt to unionize . Oh, and don't expect the game to run at 60fps on current consoles , either.
paragraphs.cn: 过去几周里，关于《GTA6》的信息大量浮现，Rockstar终于开始为这款期待已久、将于今年11月发售的游戏展开漫长营销。虽然新截图看起来惊艳，但粉丝也提出了批评；考虑到索尼今天突然宣布最终将停止PS5游戏光盘，这一点或许更说得通。幕后也有更多风波，包括更多员工试图组建工会。哦，另外也别指望这款游戏能在现有主机上以60帧运行。
